title: Opinion: Opinion | 'On Verge Of Stopping': Inside The Panic That Led To Indian Airlines' SOS Call
summary_full: The Iran shock has hit every airline in the world. Yet, only three groups have written to governments to keep them flying. One of them comprises the three Indian airlines.
